All person(s) who want to bid on a property offered by the Licking County Sheriffâs Office must register with Realauction. Registration will include completion of the Purchaser Information Form.
Properties will be open for bid, at least (7) seven days immediately prior to the date of sale. This is generally known as a proxy bid.

On scheduled Thursdayâs at 10:30 am, Eastern Time, the online auction will begin. An auction will be conducted for each individual property; however only one property will be sold at a time. After a

Deposits are as follows for Real Estate Sheriff Sales and Tax Sales: If the appraised value of the property is: $10,000.00 or less  = Deposit of $2,000.00 $10,000.01 -  $200,000.00 = Deposit of $5,000

These deposits must be at Realauction prior to bidding. Wire Transfer Deposits Must be received by 5:00 pm two (2) Business Days BEFORE the Thursday Auction ACH Debit Deposits Must be initiated by 4:0
Wire Transfer Deposits Must be received by 5:00 pm two (2) Business Days BEFORE the Thursday Auction
ACH Debit Deposits Must be initiated by 4:00 pm five (5) Business Days BEFORE the Thursday Auction
Complete case information including terms and purchaser information can be found by clicking on the case number.
Parcel information can be viewed by clicking on the parcel numbers.
Columns can be sorted by clicking the arrows above each column.
More foreclosures can be shown at one time by selecting a larger value in the "Show entries" dropdown.
Not all foreclosures are shown at once. Please navigate foreclosures using the tabs at the bottom of the listing.
Typing in the search box shows only columns with matching text. (for instance typing "newark" will show only Newark foreclosures)
To show older foreclosure information, please select the year of auction of that foreclosure.

records.legal: Featured NOTICE OF MORTGAGE FORECLOSURE SALE NOTICE OF MORTGAGE FORECLOSURE SALE THE RIGHT TO VERIFICATION OF THE DEBT AND IDENTITY OF THE ORIGINAL CREDITOR WITHIN THE TIME PROVIDED BY LAW IS NOT AFFECTED BY THIS ACTION.	NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN, that default has occurred in conditions of the followin
All person(s) who want to bid on a property offered by the Licking County Sheriffâs Office must register with Realauction. Registration will include completion of the Purchaser Information Form.
Properties will be open for bid, at least (7) seven days immediately prior to the date of sale. This is generally known as a proxy bid.

On scheduled Thursdayâs at 10:30 am, Eastern Time, the online auction will begin. An auction will be conducted for each individual property; however only one property will be sold at a time. After a

Deposits are as follows for Real Estate Sheriff Sales and Tax Sales: If the appraised value of the property is: $10,000.00 or less  = Deposit of $2,000.00 $10,000.01 -  $200,000.00 = Deposit of $5,000

These deposits must be at Realauction prior to bidding. Wire Transfer Deposits Must be received by 5:00 pm two (2) Business Days BEFORE the Thursday Auction ACH Debit Deposits Must be initiated by 4:0
Wire Transfer Deposits Must be received by 5:00 pm two (2) Business Days BEFORE the Thursday Auction
ACH Debit Deposits Must be initiated by 4:00 pm five (5) Business Days BEFORE the Thursday Auction
Complete case information including terms and purchaser information can be found by clicking on the case number.
Parcel information can be viewed by clicking on the parcel numbers.
Columns can be sorted by clicking the arrows above each column.
More foreclosures can be shown at one time by selecting a larger value in the "Show entries" dropdown.
Not all foreclosures are shown at once. Please navigate foreclosures using the tabs at the bottom of the listing.
Typing in the search box shows only columns with matching text. (for instance typing "newark" will show only Newark foreclosures)
To show older foreclosure information, please select the year of auction of that foreclosure.
